LanguageData.USAC_Bodybag.tips.0: USAC uses Credit Bonds as its trading currency instead of the silver commonly used on the rim.
LanguageData.USAC_Bodybag.tips.1: When trading with USAC merchants, make sure your Sealed Bags are inside Trade Beacon coverage.
LanguageData.USAC_Bodybag.tips.2: Body Bags only store and transport corpses, so build cold storage to slow natural decay. USAC does not buy rotten corpses.
LanguageData.USAC_Bodybag.tips.3: Body Bag's value is affected by corpse durability and quality. Faster battlefield recovery and refrigeration are usually more profitable than leaving bodies outdoors.
LanguageData.USAC_Bodybag.tips.4: Body Bag's currency value only counts bags that already contain a corpse. Empty bags provide no trade value.
LanguageData.USAC_Bond.tips.0: USAC uses Credit Bonds as its trading currency instead of the silver commonly used on the rim.
LanguageData.USAC_Bond.tips.1: USAC prioritizes collecting bonds in trade. Buying new bonds with bonds may trigger an extra "depreciation fee," so store reserves in a vault and keep its Trade Beacon turned off.
LanguageData.USAC_Bond.tips.2: The issued value of a Credit Bond is only 1000, but dealers usually sell at a premium. The premium depends on your faction goodwill with USAC.
LanguageData.USAC_Bond.tips.3: Most USAC services consume bonds directly from Trade Beacon coverage instead of your entire map stockpile. Keep reserve bonds outside beacon range if needed.
LanguageData.USAC_Bond.tips.4: If you run debt contracts and lease-style services on the same map, keep an extra bond buffer to avoid payment collisions on settlement days.
LanguageData.USAC_Debt.tips.0: USAC charges debt interest once every 30 days as a quarter. Make sure your colony has enough Credit Bonds available on settlement day.
LanguageData.USAC_Debt.tips.1: When repaying principal, any quarterly repayment above 10% of total principal can generate additional surcharge fees based on amount.
LanguageData.USAC_Debt.tips.2: If paying down principal is difficult, at least maintain enough income to keep quarterly interest payments stable.
LanguageData.USAC_Debt.tips.3: USAC offers two grace periods for unpaid interest, but the third default triggers forced collection.
LanguageData.USAC_Debt.tips.4: If your debt is about to become unpayable, consider escape this planet before too late.
LanguageData.USAC_Mech.tips.0: Heavy Mining Rigs produce pollution continuously while operating. Early planning for cleanup and isolation zones reduces disruption to your colony core.
LanguageData.USAC_Mech.tips.1: Heavy Mining Rig leases can be extended with bonds. If cash flow is tight, keep the rig running first and refill reserves in the next trade cycle.
LanguageData.USAC_Mech.tips.2: Mech readiness decreases over time and causes penalties at very low levels. Stable resupply is usually more efficient than emergency refits.
LanguageData.USAC_Mech.tips.3: Each mech resupply restores about 25% of max readiness. A dedicated resupply area and sufficient parts stock greatly reduce frontline downtime.
LanguageData.USAC_Mech.tips.4: USAC airdropped units and equipment require valid landing space. If your base is crowded, reserve open tiles in advance to reduce drop failures or drift.
